title: 3 Facts About The Human Heart

segments.text: Your heart can keep beating even when it's disconnected from your body.
The average heart beats about 100,000 times per day.
It's about the size of a fist and weighs around 10 ounces.
The heart has its own electrical system that controls the heartbeat.
Your heart pumps around 2,000 gallons of blood daily.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: The human heart is a remarkable organ with incredible abilities. Follow for daily facts!
